AI.rationale: NVDA Q2 FY26 $46.7B (+56% YoY), Blackwell ramp; MSFT Azure +39% / $75B annual; GOOGL committed $85B 2025 capex. NVDA briefly $4T market cap July, $60B buyback Aug 26. Real revenue compounding at scale.

rockets_spacecraft.rationale: RKLB Q2 record $144.5M (+36% YoY), gross profit $46.4M vs $27.2M prior, $1B backlog. Missions 69-70 in August. CHIPS Act $23.9M award Aug 22. Neutron LC-3 on track Q3 2025. Real, compounding commercial revenue.

robotics.rationale: Unitree G1 humanoid at $13,560 cost inflection; humanoid market $15B by 2030 (39% CAGR projection); ISO 25785-1 standardization May 2025. BOTZ holdings (Keyence, ABB, Fanuc) are industrial, not yet capturing humanoid revenue. Wave under-owned.

engineered_biology.rationale: ARKG ~9% in CRSP, ~9% in Tempus AI; Phase 3 CRISPR trials running for blood disorders; genome editing market ~$5B 2025 -> $13B 2035 long-horizon. ARKG AUM only ~$1.16B — under-owned relative to thesis.

quantum.rationale: Sector funding $1.25B Q1 2025; IonQ 60%+ commercial revenue share; Nadella quantum 'next big cloud accelerator' Aug 11. QTUM holdings pre-profit; quantum advantage debate ongoing. Massive attention, pre-commercial revenue.

nuclear_fusion.rationale: NUKZ +45.3% YTD as of Aug 27; Palisades NRC operations status Aug; SMR offtake pipeline 25GW->45GW H1 2025; MSFT/AMZN/GOOGL signing PPAs. AI data-center power demand structurally pulling fission. Caveat: 'fusion' label, fission revenue.

general_markets.rationale: Powell Jackson Hole Aug 22 signaled probable Sept cut; gold $3,448-3,475 Aug 31 (+3% MoM) on central-bank demand; AGG ~7.19% YTD; BIL ~4.2-4.3% pre-cut.
